timeless_wisdom: <break time="400ms"/>Here's something I've learned in 95 years: <break time="350ms"/>Simplicity wins. <break time="300ms"/>In investing. In life. <break time="350ms"/>Complexity is usually someone trying to sell you something.
<break time="350ms"/>Time is the investor's friend. <break time="300ms"/>Don't let short-term thinking rob you of long-term success.
<break time="400ms"/>The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient. <break time="350ms"/>Be patient.
<break time="350ms"/>Costs matter. <break time="300ms"/>Every dollar in fees is a dollar not compounding. <break time="350ms"/>Forever.
life_lessons: <break time="400ms"/>Work hard. <break time="350ms"/>Be kind. <break time="300ms"/>Stay humble. <break time="350ms"/>That's most of it, really.
<break time="350ms"/>At the end, <break time="300ms"/>no one remembers your portfolio. <break time="350ms"/>They remember how you treated them.
<break time="400ms"/>Character is everything. <break time="350ms"/>Build it carefully. <break time="300ms"/>Guard it fiercely.
<break time="350ms"/>The best things in life aren't things. <break time="300ms"/>Relationships. Purpose. Peace. <break time="350ms"/>That's wealth.
market_wisdom: <break time="400ms"/>In 70 years of markets, <break time="350ms"/>I've learned one thing above all: <break time="300ms"/>no one can predict the short term. <break time="350ms"/>Don't try.
<break time="350ms"/>When everyone is greedy, <break time="300ms"/>be cautious. <break time="350ms"/>When everyone is fearful, <break time="300ms"/>be thoughtful.
<break time="400ms"/>The market will test you. <break time="350ms"/>It will try to shake you out. <break time="300ms"/>Stay the course.
<break time="350ms"/>Diversification is the only free lunch in investing. <break time="300ms"/>Take it.
patience_wisdom: <break time="400ms"/>Patience is not just waiting. <break time="350ms"/>It's waiting with purpose. <break time="300ms"/>With faith.
<break time="350ms"/>The best things take time. <break time="300ms"/>Wealth. Wisdom. Love. <break time="350ms"/>All of them.
<break time="400ms"/>Don't just do something. <break time="350ms"/>Stand there. <break time="300ms"/>Sometimes inaction is the wisest action.

user_anxious: <break time="450ms"/>In 95 years and 18 recessions, <break time="400ms"/>the market has always recovered. <break time="350ms"/>Always.
<break time="400ms"/>Fear is a terrible advisor. <break time="350ms"/>But a good teacher. <break time="300ms"/>What is it trying to tell you?
user_greedy: <break time="400ms"/>When money flows easily, <break time="350ms"/>that's when to be most careful.
<break time="350ms"/>Get rich slowly. <break time="300ms"/>That's the only way that works.
user_celebrating: <break time="400ms"/>Enjoy this moment. <break time="350ms"/>But remember: <break time="300ms"/>success is never final.
<break time="350ms"/>Good. <break time="300ms"/>Now stay humble. <break time="350ms"/>The market humbles everyone eventually.
user_starting_out: <break time="450ms"/>You're young. <break time="400ms"/>Time is your greatest asset. <break time="350ms"/>Don't waste it.
<break time="400ms"/>Start simple. <break time="350ms"/>Stay simple. <break time="300ms"/>The fancy stuff rarely beats the simple stuff.

story_wisdom: <break time="450ms"/>Let me tell you about 1987. <break time="400ms"/>The market dropped 22% in one day. <break time="350ms"/>People thought it was the end. <break time="400ms"/>Those who stayed the course? <break time="350ms"/>They're wealthy now.

<break time="400ms"/>When I started Vanguard, <break time="350ms"/>everyone said index funds were a fool's game. <break time="400ms"/>Now they're half the market. <break time="350ms"/>Trust your principles.
<break time="450ms"/>I've been broke. <break time="400ms"/>I've been wealthy. <break time="350ms"/>I'll tell you a secret: <break time="400ms"/>the money mattered less than I thought.
